code: export class ZeusStatsParser{constructor(){this._stats={health:0,maxHealth:250};}flush(){this._stats={health:0,maxHealth:250};return true;}parse(wrapper){this._stats.health=wrapper.readInt();this._stats.maxHealth=wrapper.readInt();const event=new CustomEvent('zeus_stats_update',{detail:this._stats});window.dispatchEvent(event);return true;}get stats(){return this._stats;}}
